text:
There was this little mouse who dreamed of becoming an artist. He sketched all day long, dreaming about his masterpiece; his talent was exceptional. Animals came to see his art, and they admired his talent.

He often thought about showing his works at a gallery. He would stroll downtown to the gallery where the art critic lived. On the first day, the critic saw his artwork hanging on the wall. It was so beautiful that tears filled his eyes. He rushed outside to take a look!

The mouse had crafted a small life-sized sculpture of a majestic deer prancing through misty mistletoe. It was so lifelike you could almost hear the sweet chirping of the deer's antlers dancing in the breeze.

The critic didnbededly forgave the mouse because of it. Over the months, they would always talk about that one time when the deer made such a sweet chorus.

But alas, the mouse's talent didn't last forever. One day, his beautiful feather
